SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractReferendumEvaluator<T>
An abstract class representing a generic evaluator for referendums Provides methods for evaluating the outcome of a referendum based on collected referendum forms Implements the template method pattern, where the evaluate method serves as a template for the algorithm and delegates the specifics to subclasses via abstract methods
AbstractViewController
Abstract base class for JavaFX view controllers.
Admin
Represents an administrator in the AppUser system.
Application
The main entry point for running the Referendum Server application.
AppUser
Represents a main branch of AppUser hierarchy
CheckLogin
DTO (Data Transfer Object) representing the result of a login check operation Contains either an AppUser object representing a successfully logged-in user or a LoginErrorEnum representing an error encountered during the login process
ConditionalReferendum
Represents a conditional referendum in the referendum system
ConditionalReferendumEvaluator
An evaluator implementation for conditional referendums Evaluates the outcome of a conditional referendum based on collected referendum forms
DatabaseLoader
Component responsible for loading initial data into the database on application startup.
DataConfiguration
Configuration properties for storing data related to regions
DataConfiguration.RegionConfiguration
Configuration properties for each region.
EvaluateAspect
Aspect class responsible for intercepting the evaluation of referendums and triggering the notification of observers upon successful evaluation
FxmlLoadException
Exception thrown when an unexpected error occurs during the loading of an FXML scene
LocalVoter
Represents a local voter in the AppUser system
LoginErrorEnum
Enum representing possible login error types Provides constants for indicating incorrect password or non-existent user during the login process
NavigationController
Controller class for managing navigation within the application
Notification
Represents a notification associated with a specific referendum and user
NotificationController
Controller class for managing notifications view
NotificationObserver
Component class representing an Observer in the Observer pattern, responsible for managing notification subscriptions and updates.
NotificationRepository
Repository interface for managing notifications in the database Extends ListCrudRepository to provide additional list-related CRUD operations
NotificationService
Service class for managing notifications
Question
Represents a question in the referendum system
QuotaReferendum
Represents a quota referendum in the referendum system
QuotaReferendumEvaluator
An evaluator implementation for quota-based referendums Evaluates the outcome of a quota-based referendum based on collected referendum forms
Referendum
Represents a main branch of referendum hierarchy
ReferendumCreateController
Controller class for managing the creation of referendums.
ReferendumEvaluator<T>
Generic interface for evaluating referendums Implementations of this interface are responsible for evaluating the outcome of a specific type of referendum based on collected referendum forms
ReferendumForm
Represents a referendum form for collecting voter responses to questions in a referendum
ReferendumFormController
Controller class for managing the referendum form view.
ReferendumFormRepository
Repository interface for managing referendum forms in the database Extends ListCrudRepository to provide additional list-related CRUD operations
ReferendumFormService
Service class for handling operations related to referendum forms
ReferendumJavaFxApplication
The main entry point for the Referendum Server application.
ReferendumRepository
Repository interface for managing referendums in the database Extends ListCrudRepository to provide additional list-related CRUD operations
ReferendumResult
Represents the result of a referendum
ReferendumResult.Result
Enum representing the possible results of a referendum
ReferendumResultRepository
Repository interface for managing referendum results in the database Extends ListCrudRepository to provide additional list-related CRUD operations
ReferendumResultViewController
Controller class for managing the referendum result view.
ReferendumService
Service class for managing referendums and their evaluation.
ReferendumViewController
Controller class for managing the referendum view.
Region
Represents a region users can vote
RegionRepository
Repository interface for managing regions in the database Extends ListCrudRepository to provide additional list-related CRUD operations
RegionSelectController
Controller responsible for managing the selection of regions on the map, displaying region descriptions, and navigating to the corresponding referendums.
RegionService
Service class for managing regions
RegionSVGPath
Custom SVG path representation for a specific region on the map.
ResourceReader
Utility class for reading resources such as properties files.
SignInController
Controller responsible for managing user sign-in functionality.
SimpleReferendum
Represents a simple referendum in the referendum system.
SimpleReferendumEvaluator
An evaluator implementation for simple referendums Evaluates the outcome of a simple referendum based on collected referendum forms
TravelVoter
Represents a travel voter in the AppUser system.
UserException
Exception class representing an error related to user operations.
UserRepository
Repository interface for managing users in the database Extends ListCrudRepository to provide additional list-related CRUD operations
UserService
Service class for managing user-related operations.
ValidatedTextField
Custom component for a validated text field with error message display
ViewContext
A component managing the view context of the application Keeps track of the selected region, current user, selected referendum, and current page
Viewer
Represents a viewer in the AppUser system.
Voter
Represents a voter in the AppUser system.
YamlPropertyLoaderFactory
Custom property loader factory for loading YAML files as property sources This is used to address the issue where Spring only loads properties files via PropertySource Implementation reference: https://stackoverflow.com/a/51392715
